ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "artist_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the song attributes */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song's ID */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (major/minor) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_albums" (
  "song_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the song-album association */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_albums_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "publicly_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicator if the playlist is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the playlist-song association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who added the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, curator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the song */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the song was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the song on the trend date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
